---
title: "project"
author: "Xuan Phung"
date: "2026-04-29"
output:
  word_document: default
  html_document: default
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
```
```{r}
workout_dataset<- read_excel("C:/Users/amorn/Downloads/workout_dataset.xlsx")
```

```{r}
ggplot(workout_dataset, aes(x=`Time(minutes)`, y=CaloriesBurned)) +
  geom_point(size=3) + geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE)+
  labs(
    title="Calories Burned Per Workout",
    x="Workout Time (Minutes)",
    y="Calories Burned"
  )+theme_minimal()
```

$\mu:$mean calories burend 
$H_0: \mu = 200$ vs $H_a:\mu \ne 200$

```{r}
t.test(
  x = workout_dataset$CaloriesBurned,
  mu = 200,
  alternative = "greater"
)
```
